name: /postmortem --emit-test writes a vitest-style failing reproducer file under tests/ per the F-1 reproduces-as-failing-test clause
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" 'cache invalidation' --emit-test 2>err.txt && ls tests/postmortem-*-cache-invalidation.test.ts >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q 'expect(false).toBe(true)' tests/postmortem-*-cache-invalidation.test.ts && echo reproduces 1>&2
